result:
Results for 'top things to do, attractions, restaurants Brussels' in Brussels, Belgium:
1. Belgian Waffles [Sweets and dessert buffet] ⭐ 4.6 (4100 reviews) | €1–10
   📍 Rue du Marché aux Poulets 51
   "Not much else one can ask for when spending an evening in Brussels."
2. Smoke house [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.9 (357 reviews) | €30–40
   🕐 Closed · Opens 4 PM Thu
   📍 Rue Duquesnoy 43
   "This should be a must if you’re in Brussels."
3. Tram Experience: gastronomic concept aboard a tram transformed into a restaurant [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.6 (156 reviews) | €100+
   🕐 Closed · Opens 8 PM Tue
   📍 Pl. Poelaert
   "Tramming around Brussels while eating good food."
4. The blue [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.6 (6600 reviews) | €20–30
   📍 Rue du Marché aux Fromages 18
   "One of the must to visit restaurants in Brussels!"
5. 't Kelderke [Belgian] ⭐ 4.3 (2500 reviews) | €20–30
   📍 Grand Place 15
   "Remarkable food, one can't truely visit Brussels without eating here."
